channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ship carrying $90,000 in food for Toronto affected in Strait of Hormuz incident
item.description: The Daily Bread Food Bank in Toronto has reported that a shipment containing approximately $90,000 worth of food destined for the city was impacted while passing through the Strait of Hormuz. The orga...

item.title: South African State Theatre Receives 33 Naledi Nominations, Showcasing Local Talent
item.description: The South African State Theatre in Pretoria has reaffirmed its position as a central pillar of the nation’s cultural landscape by securing 33 nominations at the 21st Annual Naledi Theatre Awards for p...

item.title: Counties should lead drought prevention and early response
item.description: Drought in Kenya has become a recurring feature rather than an unpredictable crisis, with 23 out of 47 counties classified as arid or semi-arid experiencing dry spells every one to two years. The main...

item.title: Jinggoy Estrada attends DOJ preliminary probe on flood control project allegations
item.description: Senator Jinggoy Estrada arrived at the Department of Justice (DOJ) on Thursday for a preliminary investigation related to a plunder complaint filed against him and other officials concerning questiona...

item.title: Tanzania Swimming Association aligns national championships with World Aquatics standards
item.description: The Tanzania Swimming Association (TSA) has officially adopted the World Aquatics (WA) rules for its upcoming National Club Championships, happening on 11–12 April at the International School of Tanga...

item.title: PDP Schedules 2027 Primaries, Presidential Primary Set for May 23
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), under the faction led by Nyesom Wike, don announce say dem don fix May 23, 2026, as the date for their presidential primaries for 2027 general elections. This decis...

item.title: IEA member nations release oil reserves to ease fuel price spikes amid Iran conflict
item.description: Australia and New Zealand are facing a squeeze on their fuel supplies due to the ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran, particularly after Iran blocked the Strait of Hormuz, which handles roughly 20% o...

item.title: China expands trade and infrastructure cooperation with Africa amid global economic shifts
item.description: China has outlined plans to deepen its partnership with Africa, at a time when relations between African nations and the United States are strained due to heavy trade tariffs on raw materials. From 1 ...

item.title: TikTok influencer suffers fatal complications after cosmetic surgery
item.description: Rachel Tussey, a 47-year-old TikTok influencer and mother of three, has reportedly been declared brain dead following complications from a tummy tuck she shared with her 25,000 followers online. The p...

item.title: Pakistan Begins Naval Escort Operation Amid Energy Supply Concerns
item.description: The Pakistani government has launched Operation Muhafiz Ul Bahr, or 'Protector of the Seas,' aimed at safeguarding maritime transport and national trade amid disruptions to energy imports caused by on...

item.title: Atin Ito to bring aid and civilian presence to Pag-asa Island in West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Atin Ito Coalition has announced its fourth civilian mission to the West Philippine Sea, scheduled for April, focusing on Pag-asa Island in the Kalayaan Island Group. The mission aims to support n...

item.title: KSE-100 Index Recovers Modestly After Sharp Early Drop Amid Oil Price Surge and IMF Talks Delay
item.description: On Thursday, March 12, 2026, Pakistan's benchmark KSE-100 index showed strong volatility during early trading. It dropped more than 1,700 points by 9:55am, reaching a low of 153,503.70 points, but the...

item.title: Trump declares victory over Iran, U.S. continues military operations targeting mine-laying vessels
item.description: On 11th March 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump announced at a rally in Hebron, Kentucky, that the United States had achieved victory in its military operations against Iran, although he emphasised th...

item.title: Toronto man arrested in North Bay for possession of drugs and weapons during traffic stop
item.description: Ontario Provincial Police conducted a routine traffic stop in North Bay, Ontario, which led to the arrest of a Toronto man after authorities discovered illegal drugs and weapons in his vehicle. The st...

item.title: Supporters celebrate Matthew Lloyd’s 100th goal during 2001 AFL season
item.description: During the 2001 AFL season, Essendon legend Matthew Lloyd reached a major career milestone by kicking his 100th goal, drawing a huge reaction from fans. Supporters swarmed the field to celebrate the a...

item.title: India Condemns Attack on Thai-Flagged Ship Heading to Kandla in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: India on Wednesday expressed serious concern after a Thai-flagged cargo ship, Mayuree Naree, bound for the Indian port of Kandla, was attacked by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz. The Ministry of External...

item.title: Senegal passes law increasing penalties for same-sex relations and promotion of LGBT activities
item.description: Lawmakers in Senegal have approved a new bill that significantly increases penalties for same-sex sexual activities and criminalises efforts to promote homosexuality. The vote passed overwhelmingly wi...

item.title: UK releases Mandelson documents amid strained relations with Trump administration over Epstein links
item.description: The UK government has released documents detailing the vetting, appointment, and eventual departure of Peter Mandelson as British ambassador to the United States, following pressure from MPs. This dis...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for March 12, 2026
item.description: This horoscope for March 12, 2026, provides astrological guidance for each zodiac sign, offering insight into personal, professional, and financial matters. Those with birthdays today are encouraged t...

item.title: China Strengthens Partnership with Tanzania to Boost Industrial and Manufacturing Sector
item.description: China has confirmed its commitment to support Tanzania in growing its industrial sector, with special focus on manufacturing, technology transfer, and skills development. The Chinese ambassador, Ms Ch...
